name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
Chicken breast, (about 2 1/4 pounds total), skinned, boned, and halved.
Half of a 10-ounce package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained.
1. In a small mixing bowl combine cheese and Italian seasoning. Roll chicken pieces in the cheese mixture to coat lightly; set remaining cheese mixture aside.
2. Arrange chicken pieces in an 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
3. In a small saucepan cook onion in hot margarine until tender. Stir in flour; add milk all at once. Cook and stir until bubbly; stir in drained spinach and pimiento.
4. Spoon spinach mixture over chicken; sprinkle with remaining cheese mixture.
5. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes or until tender.
